definitions.text: A limb or appendage that an animal uses for support or locomotion on land.
In humans, the lower limb extending from the groin to the ankle.
examples: Dan won't be able to come to the party, since he broke his leg last week and is now on crutches.

definitions.text: The portion of the lower limb of a human that extends from the knee to the ankle.
To remove the legs from an animal carcass.
To build legs onto a platform or stage for support.
To put a series of three or more options strikes into the stock market.
